title: Building binary on docker fails (macOS)
body:
```
$ make binary
...
Running hooks in /etc/ca-certificates/update.d...
done.
 ---> c203c41b4cd5
Removing intermediate container f94c83c36144
Step 3/4 : ENV GOPATH /
 ---> Running in 64e15dacc141
 ---> c4b1f6d59474
Removing intermediate container 64e15dacc141
Step 4/4 : WORKDIR /src/github.com/projectatomic/skopeo
 ---> 5386ee37fd65
Removing intermediate container 54b268ed0483
Successfully built 5386ee37fd65
Successfully tagged skopeobuildimage:latest
docker run --rm --security-opt label:disable -v $(pwd):/src/github.com/projectatomic/skopeo \
                skopeobuildimage make binary-local  BUILDTAGS='btrfs_noversion libdm_no_deferred_remove'
go build -ldflags "-X main.gitCommit=91606d49f2f7d17c226940e98b5f42500a4c3efb" -gcflags "" -tags "btrfs_noversion libdm_no_deferred_remove" -o skopeo ./cmd/skopeo
# github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/vendor/github.com/docker/docker/client
vendor/github.com/docker/docker/client/interface_stable.go:10: cannot use Client literal (type *Client) as type APIClient in assignment:
        *Client does not implement APIClient (missing TaskInspectWithRaw method)
Makefile:60: recipe for target 'binary-local' failed
make: *** [binary-local] Error 2
make: *** [binary] Error 2
```

comments.body:
Thanks for your report. This shouldn't be happening, the implementation is in the same directory:
```
vendor/github.com/docker/docker/client/image_inspect.go:func (cli *Client) ImageInspectWithRaw(ctx context.Context, imageID string) (types.ImageInspect, []byte, error) {
```

Is this an unmodified checkout (and if so, of which exact commit), or does `git status` report any modified files?

It is a clean working dir.

```sh
$ git rev-parse HEAD
75811bd4b1ada3dba99cc00b74e1b328db08de4f
```

```sh
$ docker -v
Docker version 17.06.0-ce, build 02c1d87
```

```sh
$ docker-machine -version
docker-machine version 0.12.2, build 9371605
```

```sh
$ docker images | grep skopeobuildimage
skopeobuildimage    latest              5386ee37fd65        4 hours ago         620MB
```
@dmlemos @mtrmac @vrothberg Isn't this working in the latest skopeo?  Can I close this issue?
I am not using a Mac but others did not report that recently, so I think we're safe to close.
